mapper.sql: A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SIPMS_SVC_NM, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_HGROUP_CD , A.SSVC_MGROUP_CD, A.SSVC_LGROUP_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SUSE_TYPE_CD, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

, B.SSVC_HGROUP_NM AS SSVC_HGROUP_NM , C.SSVC_MGROUP_NM AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM , C.SSVC_MGROUP_NM1 AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM1 , D.SSVC_LGROUP_NM AS SSVC_LGROUP_NM , E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , F.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , G.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD AS SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD , G.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM AS SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM , H.SUSE_TYPE_NM AS SUSE_TYPE_NM
, A.SSVC_HGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_MGROUP_NM1 , A.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SUSE_TYPE_NM
, MST.TB_SVC_HGROUP_CD B , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD D , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD E , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_EXTERNAL_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_USE_TYPE_CD H

AND A.SSVC_HGROUP_CD = B.SSVC_HGROUP_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_MGROUP_CD = C.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_LGROUP_CD = D.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = F.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND D.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD = G.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SUSE_TYPE_CD = H.SUSE_TYPE_CD(+)
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST A
